parsed.production_notes: The video combines a digital screencast of an app interface with a live-action recording of a human hand. The hand's movements and lighting suggest it was filmed separately and composited over the UI.

characters.appearance: A light-skinned human hand and forearm. The skin is smooth, and the fingernails are short and unpainted.
characters.demeanor: Deliberate and precise, interacting with the screen.

scenes.setting: A digital interface displaying a book passage and illustrations.

panels.panel_visual_description: A light-skinned human hand and forearm enter the frame from the bottom, with the index finger extended and pointing towards the center. The background features an illustration in the upper half. Initially, this illustration is a stylized, geometric depiction of a dark barn with a large 'X' on it, surrounded by flatly drawn animals including white horses, a pig, and chickens. Halfway through, the illustration changes to a more realistic, warm-toned painting of a brown cow, several sheep, and a light-colored horse standing together. The lower half of the background is a plain, light-colored surface. The hand moves slightly, simulating tapping motions on the lower surface.

scenes.visual_description: The video is a vertical screencast of a language learning app. At the top, a Ukrainian headline encourages reading in English. Below this, an illustration from 'Animal Farm' is displayed, which changes from a stylized graphic to a realistic painting. The main body of the screen contains a passage of English text. A human hand is overlaid on the screen, tapping on highlighted English words. When a word is tapped, a pop-up appears showing the word, its phonetic pronunciation, its Ukrainian translation, and two buttons. The text highlights and pop-ups change as the hand taps different words.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker 1: All animals are equal,

Unknown speaker 2: equal

Unknown speaker 1: but some animals are more important than others, one of them read slowly.

Unknown speaker 2: slowly.

Unknown speaker 1: The animals stood silent in the cold

Unknown speaker 2: cold

Unknown speaker 1: night, staring at the wall. They tried

Unknown speaker 2: to try

Unknown speaker 1: to remember the old words,

Unknown speaker 2: word

Unknown speaker 1: but something

Unknown speaker 2: something

Unknown speaker 1: felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm

Unknown speaker 2: farm

Unknown speaker 1: looked the same as always,

Unknown speaker 2: always

Unknown speaker 1: yet nothing was the same anymore.
scenes.on_screen_text:
ЧИТАЙ КНИЖКИ АНГЛІЙСЬКОЮ ПО 10 ХВИЛИН НА ДЕНЬ (READ BOOKS IN ENGLISH FOR 10 MINUTES A DAY)
"All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others," one of them read slowly. The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old words, but something felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, yet nothing was the same anymore.
equal [ˈiːkwəl] рівний Знаю Вивчати
animals [ˈænɪməlz] тварини Знаю Вивчати
important [ɪmˈpɔːtənt] важливий Знаю Вивчати
КОЛГОСП ТВАРИН ДЖОРДЖ ОРВЕЛЛ (ANIMAL FARM GEORGE ORWELL)

cold [kəʊld] холодний Знаю Вивчати
